zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行测试压力位
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD报1568.2，24小时涨幅0.46%，价格运行于20日均线1562.67上方，显示短线多头略占优势。日内高低点区间较窄，市场处于整理阶段，但整体重心维持上移，短期趋势偏向震荡走强。

从技术指标看，MACD值为-14.04，虽然仍位于零轴下方，反映中期动能尚未完全修复，但若价格继续站稳均线上方，空头动能有进一步减弱迹象。RSI数据暂缺，因此需重点关注后续成交量与价格配合情况。

关键支撑位位于1561附近，为日内低点区域，同时20日均线1562附近也构成动态支撑。若跌破该区域，价格可能回测1550一线。上方首要阻力位在1570附近，突破后有望进一步挑战1585至1600区间。

交易策略方面，激进交易者可关注1570突破后的顺势做多机会，目标看向1585以上；稳健交易者则可等待回踩1560至1563支撑区域企稳后介入。若价格有效跌破1560，应控制仓位并防范短线回调风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1568.2, posting a modest 24-hour gain of 0.46% while remaining confined to a relatively narrow intraday range between 1561.03 and 1570. The price is currently holding above the 20-period simple moving average at 1562.67, suggesting that short-term momentum has shifted slightly in favor of buyers. Although the advance is limited, the ability to remain above key moving-average support indicates a constructive near-term technical backdrop.

The SMA(20) acting below current price levels supports a mildly bullish outlook, as it reflects improving short-term trend conditions. However, the MACD value of -14.04 remains in negative territory, signaling that broader momentum has not fully recovered from previous selling pressure. Without a signal-line reading, confirmation is incomplete, but the negative MACD suggests traders should remain cautious about assuming a sustained upside breakout until momentum indicators strengthen further.

From a price-structure perspective, immediate support is located near 1561, corresponding to the session low, followed by stronger support around the SMA(20) region near 1563. A decisive break below these levels could expose Ethereum to additional downside pressure. On the upside, resistance is emerging near 1570, the recent intraday high. A successful breakout above this barrier could encourage a move toward the 1580–1590 zone, where additional selling interest may appear.

For trading purposes, bullish participants may consider buying on pullbacks toward the 1562–1564 support area while maintaining disciplined risk management below recent lows. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for a confirmed break and close above 1570 before entering long positions. Conversely, bearish setups become more attractive if price falls below 1561 and loses support from the moving average. Given the mixed momentum signals, position sizing and strict stop-loss placement remain especially important in the current environment.
